creator: ernst@jollem.com
text:
When installing the ghostscript6 port, it cannot seem to be able to find
pdf_sec.ps.

Fix: 

I found the file at:

   * http://members.ozemail.com.au/~geoffk/pdfencrypt/pdf_sec.ps

And I've created a few mirrors:

   * http://www.pensioenconsult.com/pdf_sec.ps
   * http://www.znerd.demon.nl/pdf_sec.ps
   * http://jollem.com/~ernst/pdf_sec.ps
